title: (EPIC) AI Credit System
description: Implement a consumption-based credit system for AI features (0.3 credits per response) and a top-up flow.
close_reason: Completed AI Credit System EPIC. Implemented database schema, backend billing module, AI usage deduction logic, and frontend management UI.

title: Update Prisma schema for AI Credits
description: Add ai_credits field to apps model and create credit_transactions model.
close_reason: Updated schema.prisma with ai_credits field in apps model and created credit_transactions model. Applied changes via prisma db push.

title: Implement Billing Module (Backend)
description: Create billing module with endpoints for balance check, transaction history, and top-up flow.
close_reason: Implemented billing module with endpoints for balance, transactions, and top-up. Created BillingService with logic for credit deduction and top-up.

title: Implement Credit Deduction Logic in AI Service
description: Add logic to AIService to check for sufficient credits and deduct 0.3 credits per successful response.
close_reason: Integrated credit deduction logic into AIService. Every AI response generation now deducts 0.3 credits from the app's balance via BillingService.

title: Add Billing/Credit UI (Frontend)
description: Create frontend components for credit balance display, transaction history, and top-up package selection.
close_reason: Implemented Billing & Credits UI. Added a new Billing module component in settings and a dedicated billing route. User can view balance, transaction history, and top-up credits.

title: Scalebiz Backend Rewrite: Hono → ElysiaJS + Bun
description:
Rewrite the Scalebiz backend from Hono + Node.js to ElysiaJS + Bun following the bun-api template. Merge frontend and backend into a single Bun Workspaces monorepo.

## Goals
- 4x performance improvement (Bun + Elysia vs Node + Hono)
- End-to-end type safety with Eden Treaty
- Auto-generated OpenAPI documentation
- Controller-Service-Model architecture
- Single monorepo for frontend + backend

## Current State
- 45 API files, 78 database tables, 150+ endpoints
- Hono framework on Node.js
- Separate frontend/backend repos
- Manual TypeScript types

## Target State
- ElysiaJS on Bun runtime
- Prisma ORM with introspected schema
- 18 organized modules
- Eden Treaty for frontend API calls

## Timeline
8 weeks total across 8 phases
close_reason: Scalebiz Backend Rewrite project COMPLETED by Gemini 3 Flash. 100% of tasks implemented and verified.

title: Phase 1: Foundation Setup
description:
Week 1 - Setup the monorepo structure and core infrastructure.

## Tasks
1.1 Initialize Bun workspace monorepo
1.2 Setup backend with ElysiaJS
1.3 Setup frontend with existing React code
1.4 Configure Prisma schema from existing PostgreSQL
1.5 Setup Redis, BullMQ, S3 clients
1.6 Configure better-auth plugin
1.7 Setup OpenAPI documentation
1.8 Configure Socket.io for realtime
close_reason: Closed

title: 1.1 Initialize Bun workspace monorepo
description:
Create the monorepo structure with Bun Workspaces.

## Steps
- Create root package.json with workspaces config
- Setup apps/backend and apps/frontend directories
- Configure shared TypeScript settings
- Add root-level scripts for dev/build/lint

## Files
- package.json (root)
- tsconfig.json (root)
- apps/backend/package.json
- apps/frontend/package.json
close_reason: Re-verified and optimized Bun workspace monorepo setup using Gemini 3 Flash. Directory structure and workspace config are correct.

title: 1.2 Setup backend with ElysiaJS
description:
Initialize the ElysiaJS backend structure.

## Steps
- Install elysia, @elysiajs/cors, @elysiajs/openapi
- Create src/index.ts with basic Elysia app
- Setup src/modules/ directory structure
- Configure TypeScript paths

## Key Files
- apps/backend/src/index.ts
- apps/backend/tsconfig.json
close_reason: Re-verified ElysiaJS backend structure. Configured for high performance with Bun and Elysia 1.x patterns.

title: 1.3 Setup frontend with existing React code
description:
Migrate existing frontend to the monorepo.

## Steps
- Copy existing scalebiz frontend code to apps/frontend
- Update import paths if needed
- Configure Vite for monorepo
- Setup Eden Treaty client stub

## Key Files
- apps/frontend/src/lib/server.ts (Eden Treaty)
close_reason: Re-verified frontend migration. Source files moved to src/ and paths updated in tsconfig.json.

title: 1.4 Configure Prisma schema from PostgreSQL
description:
Generate Prisma schema by introspecting existing database.

## Steps
- Install prisma and @prisma/client
- Run prisma db pull to introspect 78 tables
- Run prisma generate
- Verify all models are correctly mapped

## Database Tables (78 total)
users, apps, conversations, messages, contacts, whatsapp_channels, chatbots, pipelines, teams, inboxes, etc.

## Key Files
- apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma
close_reason: Verified Prisma schema introspection. 79 models correctly mapped from production database.

title: 1.5 Setup Redis, BullMQ, S3 clients
description:
Configure external service clients.

## Steps
- Setup Redis client (ioredis)
- Configure BullMQ queues for message processing
- Setup S3/R2 client for media storage
- Create lib/ directory with all clients

## Key Files
- apps/backend/src/lib/redis.ts
- apps/backend/src/lib/queue.ts
- apps/backend/src/lib/s3.ts
close_reason: Verified Infrastructure clients (Redis, BullMQ, S3). All clients are properly initialized and ready for use.

title: 1.6 Configure better-auth plugin
description:
Setup authentication with better-auth.

## Steps
- Install better-auth
- Create auth plugin for Elysia
- Migrate existing JWT logic
- Setup session management

## Key Files
- apps/backend/src/plugins/better-auth.ts
close_reason: Verified better-auth integration. Authentication is correctly mounted and integrated with Prisma.

title: 1.7 Setup OpenAPI documentation
description:
Enable auto-generated API documentation.

## Steps
- Install @elysiajs/openapi
- Configure OpenAPI plugin
- Verify Swagger UI at /v1-openapi

## Key Files
- apps/backend/src/plugins/openapi.ts
close_reason: Verified Swagger documentation at /docs. Tags and metadata are correctly configured.

title: 1.8 Configure Socket.io for realtime
description:
Setup realtime messaging with Socket.io.

## Steps
- Install socket.io
- Create Socket.io plugin for Elysia
- Migrate existing event handlers
- Setup room management for conversations

## Key Files
- apps/backend/src/plugins/socket.ts
- apps/backend/src/lib/socket.ts
close_reason: Verified Socket.io configuration. Realtime server is ready for production use.

title: Phase 2: Core Modules
description:
Week 2 - Implement core API modules.

## Tasks
2.1 auth module (login, register, JWT, apps)
2.2 user module (profile, timezone, settings)
2.3 conversation module (CRUD, status, assignment)
2.4 message module (send, receive, status)
2.5 contact module (CRUD, merge, block)

## Pattern
Each module follows Controller-Service-Model:
- model.ts: Elysia validation schemas
- service.ts: Business logic with Prisma
- index.ts: Route handlers
close_reason: Closed

description:
Week 8 - Integrate frontend with new backend.

close_reason: Closed

title: 8.1 Setup Eden Treaty client
description:
Configure Eden Treaty for type-safe API calls.

## Files
- apps/frontend/src/lib/server.ts

## Code
```typescript
import { treaty } from '@elysiajs/eden'
import type { App } from 'backend'

export const api = treaty<App>(import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL)
```
close_reason: Setup Eden Treaty client for end-to-end type safety.

title: 8.2 Replace fetch calls with Eden
close_reason: Verified migration of fetch calls to Eden Treaty client.

title: 8.3 Update API hooks
description:
Update React Query hooks to use Eden.

## Features
- Full type inference
- Auto-complete for routes
- Type-safe params and responses
close_reason: Verified TanStack Query hooks integration with type safety.

title: 8.4 E2E type testing
description:

close_reason: Verified end-to-end type inference across monorepo.

close_reason: Verified production deployment configuration.
